title: Confidence Interval Construction
description: A visual breakdown of the steps and components involved in constructing a confidence interval for a population mean from a sample.
elements: Margin of Error (Critical Value * Standard Error)
relationships: Sample Data and Confidence Level are inputs used to calculate the Critical Value and Standard Error
Critical Value and Standard Error are multiplied to find the Margin of Error
The Margin of Error is added to and subtracted from the Sample Mean (x̄) to form the Confidence Interval
